_description: Healthy workspace — high bet coverage, no rollovers, hypothesis present. Expected: no risk signal.

bet.name: Onboarding Conversion Uplift
bet.problem_statement: New users drop off at step 3 of onboarding, reducing activation rate.
bet.hypothesis: We believe simplifying the onboarding flow from 5 steps to 3 will result in a 15% activation uplift for SMB founders in their first 90 days.

issues.title: Simplify step 1 form
issues.description: Remove 3 optional fields to reduce friction. Target: activation +5%.

issues.title: Add progress indicator
issues.description: Show users how many steps remain.

issues.title: A/B test new flow
issues.description: Run experiment: target 15% uplift vs baseline 50% activation.

issues.title: Define success metrics
issues.description: Success: activation_rate >= 0.65 within 90 days for new signups.
